violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Observed open bag of food in walk in freezer.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Observed ice chute on soda dispenser needs to be cleaned.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Observed traction pads in walk in cooler are uncleanable.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Observed traction pads in walk in cooler are soiled and uncleanable.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
